checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds a governed artifact retention policy draft and deterministic specbridge-artifact-retention-policy evaluator that classifies artifact families without authorizing cleanup.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The policy draft declares draft status, enforcement=none, cleanup_permission=none, artifact family classes, hard blocks, required gates, future activation requirements, blocked commands, and blocked actions. The CLI command emits policy metadata, totals, family class counts, blocked counts, future gates, family evaluations, read-only notes, and explicit output path behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are inside issue-218 exclusive_write scope. The implementation does not touch workflows, env files, secrets, dependencies, production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD security, operator decisions, issue #194, digital twin work, or artifact cleanup behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command writes only the governed policy evaluation artifact when explicitly requested, reads local artifact inventory only, performs no network calls, and performs no artifact mutation.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The changed source, docs, dashboard, state, inventory, policy, contract, scope, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit files are all declared in issue-218 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The CLI regression suite includes artifact retention policy coverage for command shape, deterministic repeated output, required fields, enforcement_status=none, required future gates, cleanup_permission=none per family evaluation, no mutation without -OutputPath, output artifact writing, -Force replacement behavior, bad OutputPath rejection, and artifact family registration.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local validation evidence is tracked in the audit packet, including a passing full smoke run. GitHub Actions passed Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking before merge.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records changed files, validation status, policy result, risk result, merge status, deployment status, completion status, and the remaining future enforcement risk.

findings.evidence: The artifact retention policy documentation states that no artifact cleanup or retention enforcement is authorized and that all family evaluations keep cleanup_permission=none.
findings.recommendation: Keep cleanup permission disabled unless a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize artifact cleanup or retention enforcement.

unresolved_risks: Actual artifact cleanup remains blocked until a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize it.
